packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
"【自在 AI 每一刻】
新增小布建议生活缴费卡片，通过提取短信中水电、燃气的费用信息，提醒你及时缴费，为生活带来便利
新增在小布建议和流体云上，显示小布记忆中保存的已购电影票，方便核销观影
新增在小布建议和流体云上，显示小布记忆中保存的已购景点门票，方便刷码入园
新增在小布建议上，显示小布记忆中保存的酒店订房信息，进行酒店入住提醒
新增桌面超级小布入口，将桌面分页符全搜入口替换为小布助手，唤醒小布更方便

【开启流畅新境界】
优化自由浮窗进入、调整位置、切换大小等操作动画，更流畅

【处处有细节，细节有惊喜】
新增官方浏览器支持部分文档处理工具：文档摘要、文档翻译、转为 PDF、转为 Word、转为 Excel
新增在私密保险箱中可分享图片和视频
新增在私密保险箱中可自定义图片或视频图集封面
新增在私密保险箱中可按照时间排序查看图片和视频，查找更方便
新增在私密保险箱的其他文件分类中可直接添加文件进行加密，操作更方便
新增当最近任务为堆叠样式时，支持在最近任务界面下滑应用卡片修改应用锁定状态
新增融合桌面-小窗支持切换使用经典投屏，导航音乐两不误
优化在文档中一次性添加文件到私密保险箱的数量限制，由 500 个修改为不限制个数
优化短信删除逻辑，全选删除消息时不需要再进行指纹或密码验证，可直接删除
优化了车载投屏音乐胶囊的界面布局，可以直接在音乐胶囊上播放、暂停、切换歌曲
优化时钟相关卡片切换逻辑，跟随系统亮暗色切换
优化简洁横幅通知功能，横屏时收到通知都将以简洁横幅通知形态显示，减少打扰
优化简洁通知操作手势，收到简洁横幅通知时也可以下滑通知，以浮窗形式显示通知应用界面
优化点击简洁横幅菜单按钮后的界面跳转形式，由原来的全屏显示改为浮窗显示，减少打扰
优化横屏时横幅通知显示位置，减少遮挡，降低打扰
优化拍照效果，提升拍摄体验

【网络通信】
新增在无网络情况下，可通过无网畅聊给附近的人发送文字、图片和语音消息，方便与同伴联系（设置-移动网络-无网畅聊）
优化网络连接兼容性和稳定性，提升网络使用体验

【系统】
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 8 月，提升系统安全性"
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
"【Effortless AI at every moment】
Adds the ""Pay bills"" widget in Breeno Suggestions. It extracts your utility bills (water, electricity, and gas) from text messages and reminds you to pay them on time.
Breeno Suggestions and Live Alerts now display movie tickets saved in Breeno Memory, allowing you to quickly present them at the entrance.
Breeno Suggestions and Live Alerts now display tickets for tourist attractions saved in Breeno Memory, allowing you to quickly present them at the entrance.
Breeno Suggestions now displays hotel booking information saved in Breeno Memory as check-in reminders.
Replaces Global Search at the bottom of the Home screen with Breeno for easier access.

【Unlock a new level of seamless experience】
Improves the animations for opening, repositioning, and resizing a floating window.

【Delight in details】
Browser now includes new tools to summarize, translate, and convert documents to PDF, Word, or Excel formats.
You can now share images and videos in Private Safe.
You can now customize image or video album covers in Private Safe.
You can now sort and view images and videos by time in Private Safe.
You can now add files directly under the ""Other files"" category in Private Safe.
When recent tasks are stacked, you can now modify an app's lock status by swiping down on the app on the recent tasks screen.
Fusion Desktop - Small Window now supports switching to the classic casting mode, allowing for seamless navigation and music playback.
You can now add an unlimited number of files to Private Safe in Documents at once, instead of the previous limit of 500.
You can now select and delete all messages without verifying your fingerprint or password.
Improves the layout of the music player capsule on the car display. You can now play, pause, and switch songs directly in the music player capsule.
Clock-related widgets now switch between light and dark modes based on system settings.
All notifications received in landscape mode are now displayed in a simplified banner format to reduce interruptions.
You can now swipe down on a simplified banner notification to display the app in a floating window.
Tapping a button on a simplified banner notification now opens the app in a floating window instead of full screen, reducing interruptions.
Adjusts the position of banner notifications in landscape mode to minimize distractions.
Improves camera performance for a better user experience.

【Network connections】
You can now send text, image, and voice messages to nearby people via BeaconLink when there is no internet connection. You can find this feature in ""Settings - Mobile network - BeaconLink"".
Improves network compatibility and stability for a better user experience.

【System】
Integrates the August 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security."

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【小布助手】
新增可通过语音唤醒小布，让小布帮你点一单历史外卖。例如对小布说：“帮我点个上一单的外卖”（当前仅支持一个月内已点过的美团、美团外卖和饿了么外卖）

【小布建议】
新增小布建议支持显示大麦网购买的演出出票及观演提醒

【智慧车载】
新增手机投屏至车载屏幕时，限制屏幕刷新率的开关，让手机恢复高刷新率，使用更流畅（手机设置-智慧车载-更多设置-限制屏幕刷新率开关）
新增手机通过 CarLife 投屏至车载屏幕后，手机和车载屏幕上均可调节投屏分辨率
新增手机投屏至车载屏幕时的高斯模糊效果，提升视觉体验

【相机】
优化拍照效果，提升拍摄体验

【相册】
新增相册缩略图支持显示 Livephoto 标志，方便查找实况照片
优化相册首页的自定义能力，支持将指定的图集内容不显示在相册首页照片列表
优化实况照片设置壁纸的效果

【应用】
新增支持在来电和通话记录界面隐藏联系人号码，降低隐私泄露风险（电话本-设置-更多设置-隐藏联系人号码）
新增铃声渐响功能，开启后闹钟响铃时声音会由低到高逐渐增强（时钟-闹钟-设置-铃声渐响）
新增更多常用应用支持使用密码本在登录页自动填充
新增录音支持自定义分组，便于管理录音文件
新增通话录音支持按联系人自动分组
优化来电拦截规则，对标记号码类型（如骚扰电话、广告推销等）可以分别选择更多拦截阈值，方便设置（电话本-右上角更多图标-骚扰拦截-拦截规则设置-来电拦截规则-拦截标记号码）
优化录音分组功能，新增普通分组，标准、会议、采访模式下的录音将自动分组到普通分组

【系统】
新增临时屏蔽横幅通知功能，打游戏、看视频时，频繁收到应用通知，可上滑通知临时屏蔽，减少打扰（设置-通知与控制中心-横幅通知-临时屏蔽）
新增支持多屏触控，一个应用全屏显示，一个应用自由浮窗显示，双应用可同时操作，更高效
新增控制中心关机重启快捷开关，点击即可跳转至关机重启界面
新增支持将桌面上相同尺寸的卡片拖动到一起，卡片将堆叠展示
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 7 月，提升系统安全性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
"【Breeno】
You can now wake Breeno to order the same takeaway food as the previous order. This feature only supports orders made with Meituan, Meituan Waimai, and Ele.me within a month.

【Breeno Suggestions】
Breeno Suggestions now supports showing reminders from the Damai ticketing platform for ticket issuance and showtimes.

【Smart Cars】
Adds the Limit screen refresh rate switch, enabling higher refresh rates and enhanced performance during car display. You can find this feature in ""Settings - Smart Cars - More settings - Limit screen refresh rate"".
Adds the ability to adjust screen mirroring resolution on both the phone and car screen when mirroring via CarLife.
Introduces a Gaussian blur effect during car display.

【Camera】
Improves camera performance for a better user experience.

【Photos】
Adds the Live badge to thumbnails in Photos to make live photos easier to locate.
Enhances the customization options on the Photos homepage, allowing you to hide the content of specific albums from the overall photo list.
Improves the quality of wallpapers derived from live photos.

【Apps】
You can now hide contact numbers in the incoming call and call log screens to reduce the risk of privacy leaks. You can find this feature in ""Contacts - Settings - More settings - Hide contact phone numbers"".
Adds the Gradual alarm volume feature, where the alarm volume will increase progressively from low to high. You can find this feature in ""Clock - Alarm- Settings - Gradual alarm volume"".
Adds support for more commonly used apps to automatically fill in passwords on the sign-in page.
Recorder now supports customizable grouping, making it easier to manage audio files.
Call recordings can now be automatically grouped by contacts.
Improves call blocking rules by allowing more selective blocking thresholds for flagged numbers (such as spam calls and telemarketing). You can find this feature in ""Contacts -︙- Block & filter - Block & filter - Block calls - Block flagged numbers"".
Adds the In-person recordings group in Recorder. Recordings made in Standard/Meeting/Interview modes are automatically grouped into the In-person recordings category.

【System】
Adds the Temporarily block feature. You can swipe up on a banner notification to temporarily block any further banner notifications from this app when you play games or watch videos. You can find this feature in ""Settings - Notifications & Quick Settings - Banners - Temporarily block"".
Adds support for multi-screen control, allowing you to display one app in full screen and another in a floating window. Both apps can be operated simultaneously.
Adds a Restart shortcut to Quick Settings, allowing for quicker phone restarts.
When you drag widgets of the same size together, the widgets will be stacked.
Integrates the July 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security."

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【通信互联】
新增融合桌面形态下，可切换到 Car+ 车联投屏模式
优化网络连接兼容性和稳定性，提升网络使用体验

【相机】
优化相机性能，提升拍摄体验
优化相机拍摄效果

【应用】
修复系统相机拍摄的 HDR 视频在导出实况后低概率出现显示过曝问题

【小布建议】
新增 AI 录音卡片，支持在桌面一键录音、一键转文本和生成 AI 摘要，方便快速对当前通话进行记录

【系统】
优化微信内打开相册时的加载体验，使用更流畅
优化微信内视频通话和小程序使用流畅性
优化抖音使用体验，稳定流畅且更省电
优化后台管控策略，改善异常服务耗电，提升续航体验
优化系统稳定性和流畅性
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 5 月，提升系统安全性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Communication & interconnection】
You can now switch to Car Connect mode in Fusion desktop.
Improves network compatibility and stability for a better user experience.

【Camera】
Improves camera performance for a better photography experience.
Improves camera performance.

【Apps】
Fixes a rare overexposure issue in HDR videos shot by the system camera after being exported as live photos.

【Breeno Suggestions】
Adds the recorder widget, which allows you to record audio, transcribe audio into text, and generate summaries directly from the Home screen.

【System】
Improves system performance when accessing your photos from WeChat.
Improves system performance when making video calls and using mini programs in WeChat.
Improves the user experience of Douyin, which now runs more smoothly and consumes less power.
Improves the control strategy for background apps to extend battery life.
Improves system stability and performance.
Integrates the May 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【通信互联】
新增远程控制 Windows 电脑功能，支持远程访问电脑文件和控制电脑屏幕，实现远程轻办公和文件远程互传
新增 AI 通话翻译功能，通话中可将双方通话进行实时双语互译，支持选择语音播报或仅显示译文，轻松应对跨语言沟通（电话-设置-AI 通话助手-通话翻译）
优化网络连接稳定性和兼容性，提升网络使用体验
优化蓝牙连接兼容性

【相机】
优化相机稳定性，提升拍摄体验

【相册】
AI 图像助手新增 AI 最佳表情功能，可基于本人其他照片，将面部表情优化至最佳，让照片更出片

【智慧车载】
新增在车载投屏上使用音乐应用时，应用中会显示悬浮播控键，方便随时播放和切歌
优化连接车机后，车机上的音量调节方式，可对导航音量和媒体音量进行单独调节（设置-声音与通知-音频调节方式）

【小布建议】
新增在小布建议和流体云上，显示大麦演出提醒，包括演出出票、开场及座位号等服务信息，方便获取信息

【小布识屏】
新增小布识屏选词模式，点击后可对屏幕上文字进行分词选词操作，方便选择和复制，操作更便捷

【便签】
新增笔记内支持通过拖拽音视频文档来调整位置
新增支持音视频文档文件可通过分享保存到便签
新增笔记详情页内支持通过相机、相册、文件管理插入音视频文档文件

【天气】
新增在天气中显示潮汐信息，为赶海、出海等活动提供更多信息

【时钟】
新增闹钟设置提醒，在节假日上班前 1 日主动提醒设置闹钟
新增秒抢闹钟功能，支持通过流体云卡片显示当前时间并精确到秒，抢票更及时

【私密保险箱】
新增支持在私密保险箱中搜索文件，查找更方便
优化私密保险箱中加密单个文件时的文件大小限制，最大支持 20G

【系统】
优化部分场景下功耗表现，提升续航体验
提升系统稳定性与流畅性
新增未成年人模式及桌面图标，开启后可帮助未成年人健康使用手机
新增桌面小布助手入口，将桌面下方的搜索按钮调整为小布助手，点击即可与小布进行对话
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
"【Communication & interconnection】
Adds remote control support for Windows PC. You can now control your PC and access PC files remotely with your mobile device.
Adds the Translate Call feature, which can translate calls in real-time by either reading the translated speech aloud or displaying the translation as text. This feature is available in ""Phone - Settings - AI Call Assistant - Translate Call"".
Improves the stability and compatibility of network connections for a better user experience.
Improves Bluetooth compatibility.

【Camera】
Improves camera stability for a better photography experience.

【Photos】
Adds the AI Perfect Shot feature in AI Editor. This feature is designed to enhance facial expressions by analyzing other photos of the same individual, resulting in more striking and memorable images.

【Smart Cars】
Music apps on the car display now include intuitive floating control buttons, allowing you to easily play music or switch songs with a simple tap.
You can now adjust the volume of navigation and media separately when your device and your car are connected. You can find this feature in ""Settings - Sound & notifications - Volume adjustment"".

【Breeno Suggestions】
Breeno Suggestions and Live Alerts now support showing reminders from the Damai ticketing platform for ticket issuance, showtimes, and seat numbers.

【Breeno Touch】
Adds a new Breeno Touch option for you to select words on the screen to help you copy only the content you need.

【Notes】
You can now drag an audio or video file in your note to adjust its location.
You can now share audio or video files to Notes to save them.
You can now insert audio or video files from Camera, Photos, or My Files into your notes.

【Weather】
Adds tide information to Weather to provide more information for activities such as fishing or going out to sea.

【Clock】
Adds a reminder to set an alarm one day before a public holiday ends.
Adds the Scramble! Alarm, which can send time-critical reminders for ticket scrambling through Live Alerts.

【Private Safe】
You can now search for files in Private Safe.
You can now encrypt a single file up to 20 GB in Private Safe.

【System】
Reduces power consumption to extend battery life in some scenarios.
Improves system stability and performance.
Adds Minor mode to Settings and the Home screen. This mode enforces restrictions designed to promote healthy digital device usage for minors.
You can now select Breeno as the Home screen search button, allowing you to start a conversation with just a tap."

packageInfoDetail.companyName: 山西环境执法单北斗定制
